2603.26317.title: Label-Free Cross-Task LoRA Merging with Null-Space Compression
2603.26317.paper_summary: Model merging combines independently fine-tuned checkpoints without joint multi-task training. In the era of foundation-model, fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is prevalent, making LoRA merging a promising target. Existing approaches can work in homogeneous settings where all target tasks are classification but often fail when tasks span classification and regression. Approaches using entropy-based surrogates do not apply to regression and are costly for large language models due to long token sequences. We introduce Null-Space Compression (NSC) Merging, a label-free, output-agnostic method that sets merge weights from adapter geometry. Our key observation is that during LoRA finetuning the down-projection factor $A$ in $ΔW = BA$ compresses its null space, and the compression correlates with performance. NSC uses this as an optimization signal for merging that can generalize across classification, regression, and sequence generation. NSC achieves state-of-the-art performance across twenty heterogeneous vision tasks with balanced gains where prior methods overfit subsets of tasks. It also outperforms baselines on six NLI benchmarks and on vision-language evaluations for VQA and image captioning, demonstrating scalability and effectiveness.
2603.26317.paper_summary_zh: 模型合併結合了獨立微調的檢查點，而不需要聯合多任務訓練。<lb/>在基礎模型的時代，使用低秩適應（LoRA）進行微調已變得普遍，使得LoRA合併成為一個有前景的目標。<lb/>現有的方法可以在所有目標任務都是分類的同質環境中運作，但當任務跨越分類和回歸時，往往會失敗。<lb/>使用基於熵的替代方法不適用於回歸，並且對於大型語言模型，由於長令牌序列而成本高昂。<lb/>我們引入了無效空間壓縮（NSC）合併，這是一種無標籤、輸出無關的方法，根據適配器幾何形狀設置合併權重。<lb/>我們的關鍵觀察是，在LoRA微調過程中，$ΔW = BA$中的下投影因子$A$壓縮了其無效空間，並且這種壓縮與性能相關。<lb/>NSC利用這一點作為合併的優化信號，能夠在分類、回歸和序列生成之間進行泛化。<lb/>NSC在二十個異質視覺任務中實現了最先進的性能，並且在先前的方法過擬合任務子集的情況下，取得了平衡的增益。<lb/>它在六個NLI基準測試和VQA及圖像標題生成的視覺語言評估中也超越了基準，展示了可擴展性和有效性。
2603.26317.author: Wonyoung Lee et.al.
2603.26317.authors: Wonyoung Lee, Wooseong Jeong, Kuk-Jin Yoon
